Struct InfoBadgeTemplateSettings

Namespace
FluentGpu.Controls
Assembly
FluentGpu.Controls.dll

Computed template settings for the InfoBadge — the typed-record convention modelled on ExpanderTemplateSettings. Mirrors WinUI's generated InfoBadgeTemplateSettings: the display kind (Dot vs Value vs Icon, derived from Value/Icon exactly like OnDisplayKindPropertiesChanged), the resolved badge height/width and the pill corner radius (= ActualHeight/2, per OnSizeChanged), and the per-kind content margin.

public readonly record struct InfoBadgeTemplateSettings : IEquatable<InfoBadgeTemplateSettings>
Implements
IEquatable<InfoBadgeTemplateSettings>
Inherited Members

ValueType.ToString()

object.GetType()
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)

Constructors

InfoBadgeTemplateSettings(byte, float, float, float, Edges4)

Computed template settings for the InfoBadge — the typed-record convention modelled on ExpanderTemplateSettings. Mirrors WinUI's generated InfoBadgeTemplateSettings: the display kind (Dot vs Value vs Icon, derived from Value/Icon exactly like OnDisplayKindPropertiesChanged), the resolved badge height/width and the pill corner radius (= ActualHeight/2, per OnSizeChanged), and the per-kind content margin.

public InfoBadgeTemplateSettings(byte Kind, float Height, float MinWidth, float CornerRadius, Edges4 ContentMargin)

Parameters

Kind byte

0 = Dot, 1 = Value (text), 2 = Icon (font/glyph).

Height float

Resolved badge height: 4 for a Dot, otherwise clamped to MaxHeight = 16.

MinWidth float

Resolved minimum width: 4 for a Dot, otherwise 16 (MeasureOverride squares a too-narrow badge).

CornerRadius float

InfoBadgeCornerRadius = Height / 2 — a full pill (2 for a Dot, 8 for a 16-tall badge).

ContentMargin Edges4

Per-kind inner margin: Value/FontIcon = 4,0,4,2; a non-font IconElement = 4,4,4,4 (IconInfoBadgeIconMargin, InfoBadge_themeresources.xaml:16).

Fields

ContentMarginSymbolIcon 

public static readonly Edges4 ContentMarginSymbolIcon

Field Value

Edges4

ContentMarginValueOrFontIcon 

public static readonly Edges4 ContentMarginValueOrFontIcon

Field Value

Edges4

IconGlyphSizeFull 

public const float IconGlyphSizeFull = 14

Field Value

float

IconGlyphSizePadded

WinUI renders the icon inside a Viewbox (IconPresenter, VerticalAlignment=Stretch) that fills the RootGrid content box, so the glyph is scaled to the box HEIGHT, not a fixed font size. The box height is 16 minus the RootGrid Padding AND the IconPresenter margin: the FontIcon state margin is 4,0,4,2 (IconInfoBadgeFontIconMargin, InfoBadge_themeresources.xaml:14, applied at :71) — the Attention/Informational Icon STYLES additionally pad the root 0,4,0,2 (:96/:108) → 16 − (4+2) − (0+2) = 8 tall, while an unpadded FontIcon keeps 16 − (0+2) = 14; the non-font 'Icon' state (SymbolIconSource) margin is 4,4,4,4 (IconInfoBadgeIconMargin, :16, applied at :65) → 16 − (4+4) = 8. We reproduce that by driving the glyph Size off these per-state target heights.

public const float IconGlyphSizePadded = 8

Field Value

float

IconGlyphSizeSymbol 

public const float IconGlyphSizeSymbol = 8

Field Value

float

MaxHeight 

public const float MaxHeight = 16

Field Value

float

MinDim 

public const float MinDim = 4

Field Value

float

ValueFontSize 

public const float ValueFontSize = 11

Field Value

float

Properties

ContentMargin

Per-kind inner margin: Value/FontIcon = 4,0,4,2; a non-font IconElement = 4,4,4,4 (IconInfoBadgeIconMargin, InfoBadge_themeresources.xaml:16).

public Edges4 ContentMargin { get; init; }

Property Value

Edges4

CornerRadius

InfoBadgeCornerRadius = Height / 2 — a full pill (2 for a Dot, 8 for a 16-tall badge).

public float CornerRadius { get; init; }

Property Value

float

Height

Resolved badge height: 4 for a Dot, otherwise clamped to MaxHeight = 16.

Property Value

float

Kind

0 = Dot, 1 = Value (text), 2 = Icon (font/glyph).

Property Value

byte

MinWidth

Resolved minimum width: 4 for a Dot, otherwise 16 (MeasureOverride squares a too-narrow badge).

public float MinWidth { get; init; }

Property Value

float

Methods

For(int, bool)

Pure factory — recomputes the kind/geometry from Value & whether an icon glyph is present, exactly like WinUI's OnDisplayKindPropertiesChanged (Value >= 0 wins, then Icon, else Dot) and OnSizeChanged (corner = height/2). Called once at reconcile time, never in a hot bind thunk.

public static InfoBadgeTemplateSettings For(int value, bool hasIcon)

Parameters

value int
hasIcon bool

Returns

InfoBadgeTemplateSettings
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
